post-install-cmd: @php -r "if (!is_dir('uploads')) mkdir('uploads', 0775, true); if (!is_dir('uploads/certificates')) mkdir('uploads/certificates', 0775, true); if (!is_dir('uploads/portfolio')) mkdir('uploads/portfolio', 0775, true);"
post-update-cmd: @php -r "if (!is_dir('uploads')) mkdir('uploads', 0775, true); if (!is_dir('uploads/certificates')) mkdir('uploads/certificates', 0775, true); if (!is_dir('uploads/portfolio')) mkdir('uploads/portfolio', 0775, true);"
